overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai walking through a vibrant spring landscape. The character traverses a yellow flower field under sunny skies before weather transitions to a stormy atmosphere along a riverbank, with a traditional Japanese castle visible in the distance throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunny yellow flower field with distant castle

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily through dense yellow flowers toward a distant Japanese castle

entered.detail: multi-tiered white traditional castle situated on a hillside in the distance
dense field of bright yellow flowers covering the ground completely
misty forested mountains forming the valley backdrop
single tree with pink cherry blossoms on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks through a vast field of yellow flowers under a bright morning sun. A traditional Japanese castle sits prominently on a distant hillside, framed by misty mountains. A lone cherry blossom tree stands on the left horizon as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy river approach under stormy skies

events.description: sky darkens dramatically as heavy storm clouds roll in, shifting from bright sunlight to overcast
ground surface transitions from yellow flowers to green grass and riverbank vegetation

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as weather changes to stormy, approaching the river with the castle now to the right

entered.detail: calm river surface becoming visible ahead through the grass

segments.scene_description: The weather shifts dramatically to a stormy atmosphere as the character leaves the flower field behind. The ground becomes grassy as the river comes into view ahead. The castle shifts to the right side of the frame while the cherry blossom tree grows larger on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky riverbank with castle view across water

events.description: location name 'KAMIAGATA' appears on screen identifying the region

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky river shoreline with the castle visible across the water under dark storm clouds

entered.detail: rocky and pebble shoreline along the water's edge
line of cherry blossom trees along the opposite riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky riverbank under dark stormy skies. The river stretches across the middle of the frame with the Japanese castle now centered on the opposite shore. Cherry trees line the far bank while the location name appears on screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant spring landscape that transforms from a sun-drenched flower field into a moody, stormy riverbank. It begins with a samurai walking through a vast expanse of yellow flowers under a bright morning sun, with a traditional Japanese castle framed by misty mountains in the distance. As the character leaves the blossoms behind, the weather shifts dramatically to a stormy atmosphere and the terrain transitions into green grass. The scene then opens up to a rocky riverbank under dark skies, with the castle shifting to the center of the frame on the opposite shore. Finally, the camera follows the character along the water's edge as cherry trees line the far bank and a location name appears on screen.
